name: Momentum/breakout filtered by MLOFI
limitation: Current proxy uses 5-minute synthetic features, not true 1/5/15/30 second MLOFI lookbacks.

name: Pure multi-level OFI directional model
limitation: Current proxy can compare static imbalance and mlofi_qty at 5-minute event spacing only.

name: Liquidity-vacuum breakout
limitation: Only a weak proxy exists because Phase 9 Tier C does not yet carry explicit withdrawal/replenishment rates.

name: Trade-flow plus depth confirmation
limitation: Event intensity is not a substitute for signed aggressive trade imbalance.

name: Microprice entry/exit filter
limitation: Standalone microprice results are diagnostic only; plan says not to promote it as a standalone annual-return strategy.

name: Absorption and exhaustion reversal
limitation: Can only label absorption-like proxies; top-five market-by-price cannot prove iceberg/participant identity.

name: Mean reversion after imbalance
limitation: Proxy uses imbalance/intensity and regime_code; explicit replenishment is still missing.

name: Cross-ticker/index lead-lag OFI
limitation: Can compute market-level proxy factors, but causal lead-lag validation requires dedicated synthetic controls.

name: Pure queue-imbalance scalping
limitation: Benchmark only. Accuracy above 50% is not sufficient without spread/cost survival.

name: Passive market making
limitation: Passive market-making module is execution/risk plumbing only; true queue fills are not observed.

name: Spoof-like wall filter
limitation: Spoof-like wall module is a risk-filter specification only; it does not classify manipulation or participants.
